claims.claim: Sonata has a working low-level research stack with multiple validated subsystems
evidence: Test runner passes for tensor/autograd/backend/model/Mamba/MoE tests
Checkpoint round-trip and training resume validated
limitations: Some subsystems are validated in narrow tests only

claims.claim: GPU execution is real and validated in narrow tests
evidence: Zero CPU fallback in benchmark runs
limitations: Small matrices do not benefit from Tensor Cores

claims.claim: Training path runs end-to-end through custom autograd engine
evidence: TinyStories BPE sustained training: ~6,800 tok/s (30 steps)
TinyStories BPE peak micro-benchmark: ~18,000 tok/s (Batch=320, 4 steps)
Zero CPU fallback across all precision modes
limitations: Sustained throughput ~7K tok/s; 18K is peak micro-benchmark only

claims.claim: Benchmark correction demonstrates stability-first engineering discipline
evidence: Root cause analysis: memory leaks + VRAM overflow
limitations: Requires continued discipline in future phases

claims.claim: INT8 quantization path has correctness, parity, and memory evidence
limitations: INT8 vs FP32 throughput identical on small models
Real sustained throughput ~7K tok/s with profile-default batch sizes

claims.claim: Mamba-style sequence layer integrated into custom autograd and training path
evidence: Training runs with Mamba module in loop
limitations: Not tested at diverse model scales

claims.claim: Logos symbolic-control bridge exists and participates in experiments
limitations: Partially fragile — full daemon setup not turnkey
Not hardened into mature symbolic platform

evidence: All message type serialization tests pass
Binary chunk benchmark: 1 MiB at near-zero ms

claims.claim: Hardware limits materially constrain training scale
evidence: Benchmark ceiling analysis: ~6,000 tok/s stable on current hardware
limitations: These limitations are themselves evidence of honesty
Sustained throughput ~7K tok/s on tiny model; larger models will be slower
